name: Bacon Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and baking powder and salt.
2. Add the cornmeal to the sifting mixture.
3. Combine the egg, milk, and crisped bacon in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Fill well-oiled muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for an additional 10 minutes before serving.
